MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SENDHUB, INC., CAMEO GLOBAL, INC.'s Motion To Strike Or Tax Costs.

Defendants' motion to strike or tax costs is DENIED. CCP 685.040 et seq. ("Right to Costs of Enforcing Judgment") applies; CRC 3.1700 ("Prejudgment costs") does not. The costs memorandum was timely (CCP 685.070(b)), and attorney fees may be sought via such a memo. (David S. Karton, A Law Corp. v. Dougherty (2009) 171 Cal.App.4th 133, 145.) Plaintiffs evidenced reasonable attorney fees - a simple showing that could have been addressed in defendants' reply. (Weiss Dec.) Defendants' counsel controlled the timing of submissions by selecting a hearing date for their motion.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
